rulings.Case Title: JOSEPH GARZA et al VS. ASBESTOS DEFENDANTS(B P) AS REFLECTED ON EXHIBITS et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion To Quash Plaintiffs Civil Subpoena For Personal Appearance And Request For Production Of Documents And Things At Trial Or Hearing, (2) To Quash And Vacate Order To Appear For Examination, And (3) For Issuance Of A Protective Order
rulings.Rulings: On Asbestos Discovery Calendar for Tuesday, February 1, 2011 in Department 220 at 9:00 a.m., Line 1. Travelers Casualty and Surety Company¿s motion to quash plaintiff¿s civil subpoena for personal appearance and request for production of documents and things at trial or hearing, to quash and vacate order to appear for examination, and for issuance of a protective order is continued to March 15, 2011 at 9:00 a.m. in Department 220 per agreement of the parties. = (220/HEK)
